title: Top 8 Finalist · Code-A-Thon 2.0
description: Out of 100+ teams, Singularity placed Top 8. Not a weekend sprint — built over 1.5 months. Real-time telemetry from NASA, SpaceX, and ISRO. Orbital mechanics, 3D globe, live ISS tracking, AI integration. The kind of project you build when you actually give a damn.

title: Shipped to 500+ Users · SIMS
description: Most portfolio projects live on localhost. SIMS lives at a real domain and gets opened by 500+ students every day. Built during my internship under the HOD — I owned the entire frontend. Seeing something you built actually get used hits different.

title: GitHub Workshop · Volunteer
description: Ran a Git & GitHub workshop for third-year students — version control, branching, collaborative workflows. Teaching something is the fastest stress-test for how well you actually know it.

title: 8.365 GPA · B.Tech
description: Hackathons, internship, freelance, active projects — and still an 8.365. The academics and the building happen in parallel, not instead of each other.
